data.title: Durov warns of privacy risk from Signal push notifications, as law enforcement recovered deleted messages from logs.
data.description: Following recent reports, it has been revealed that law enforcement officials were able to access deleted Signal messages by retrieving them through device push notification logs. This development has raised concerns about the security and privacy of messaging apps like Signal. The incident highlights the need for users to be cautious about their digital communications, as even seemingly deleted messages can still be accessed. It serves as a reminder for individuals to be mindful of the information they share and the platforms they use for communication. This revelation underscores the importance of staying informed about data privacy and encryption when utilizing messaging services.

data.title: Bitcoin miners are challenged by decreasing margins and increasing capital needs heading into the 2028 halving.
data.description: As the 2028 halving approaches, Bitcoin miners are facing challenges with reduced profit margins, heightened competition in power markets, and a growing necessity for disciplined capital management. The upcoming halving event, anticipated to occur in [specific year], will halve the rewards miners receive for verifying transactions on the Bitcoin network. This means miners will need to find ways to operate more efficiently and strategically manage their resources to remain profitable in the increasingly competitive landscape of cryptocurrency mining.

data.title: European banks and companies are actively choosing partners for stablecoin initiatives as demand for stablecoins in Europe rises due to practical requirements.
data.description: In Europe, the adoption of stablecoin is transitioning from planning to implementation, as there is a growing demand driven by actual necessities.

data.title: Researchers propose transaction design to protect Bitcoin from quantum attacks, no fork needed. #bitcoin #quantum #research
data.description: A recent proposal recommends that Bitcoin users can protect themselves from potential quantum attacks by utilizing a transaction design that adheres to the current rules of the network. This approach aims to safeguard the security of Bitcoin users in the face of emerging quantum threats.

data.title: AbbVie Showcases Late‑Breaking Phase 2 Data for Mirvetuximab Soravtansine-gynx (ELAHERE®) in Platinum‑Sensitive Ovarian Cancer (PSOC) at SGO 2026
data.description: Findings from the Phase 2 IMGN853-0420 trial revealed that the combination of mirvetuximab soravtansine (ELAHERE®) and carboplatin resulted in an objective response rate of 62.7% among patients who exhibited a folate receptor of ≥50%. The safety profile of the treatment regimen was consistent with previous reports, indicating positive outcomes regarding its tolerability and effectiveness.

data.title: Over 100,000 Qualifier Participants Across 100 Nations and Territories to Compete in 16 Titles for a Place at the Inaugural Esports Nations Cup 2026
data.description: The Esports Foundation (EF) announced today that qualifiers in various countries have presented numerous chances for individuals to represent their nations on a worldwide platform. The Esports Nations Cup 2026 (ENC) will feature a total of 16 games in the competition. The event is set to take place in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, with the qualifiers opening up amazing opportunities for national representation on a global scale.

data.title: AAVE expected to bounce back to $94-96 in April with oversold RSI at 34.90. Support at $84.75, resistance at $99.17.

data.title: Senator Lummis warns US has 'last chance' to pass CLARITY Act before 2030 to secure financial future.
data.description: Senator Cynthia Lummis emphasized the importance of not jeopardizing the country's financial future by continuing to delay the CLARITY Act.

data.title: ATTACK SHARK Launches X11 ULTRA Carbon Fiber Gaming Mouse Ahead of 2nd Anniversary Sale
data.description: In New York on April 12, 2026, ATTACK SHARK, a popular gaming peripheral company, announced the release of its latest product, the X11 ULTRA carbon fiber gaming mouse. Known for providing budget-friendly and top-notch mechanical keyboards, gaming mice, and accessories, ATTACK SHARK aims to emphasize this flagship model. The X11 ULTRA boasts cutting-edge technology, sleek design, and enhanced performance capabilities. More information was revealed regarding this product launch, showcasing its potential to revolutionize the gaming experience.
